## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥1006** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Day-1 + every merge |
| **Full solution ≥1046** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | S32-13 closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff HEAD -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Bridge/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty | Unity + all stories |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit | S32-02, S32-03, S32-06, S32-07 |
| **No full corpora in CI** | Curated fixtures + `--max-records` caps only | S32-02, S32-03 |
| **No physical TL forks** | `rg TlBranchDatabase\|BranchDatabase` → zero | S32-02, S32-03 |
| **Production Baltic hash** | World hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged unless producer approves | S32-04, S32-05, S32-08, S32-09 |
| **Isolated fixtures** | New combat/sensor fixtures ∉ `ReplayGoldenRegressionCatalog.All` | S32-04, S32-05, S32-08, S32-09 |

## Automated Tests Required

### S32-02 — Unified Release-Train Manifest (Integration) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|CmoMarkdown|Platform|CatalogImport|Snapshot|TlTier|Scenario|TlRelease" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform|Scenario" -v minimal
```

**What to test:**
- `RecordRelease` consolidates S31 per-domain rows into one unified manifest
- `scenario_validate` resolves manifest-backed `dbRef`/`snapshotId` at load
- Deterministic sorted export hash stable across re-import
- `TL_RELEASE_TRAIN_MISMATCH` / `TL_RELEASE_TRAIN_NOT_FOUND` on stale/missing rows

**Edge cases:** stale hash; missing domain row; tier normalization; conflicting explicit `dbRef`; empty diff on identical re-import

**Estimated test count:** ~8–12

---

### S32-03 — Mount/Loadout Quarantine Triage (Integration)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|CmoMarkdown|Platform|CatalogImport|Snapshot|Quarantine" -v minimal
```

**What to test:**
- Curator triage identifies quarantined ship/facility/submarine child rows
- Bounded FK repair promotes in-envelope rows only
- Out-of-envelope rows stay quarantined with documented reason
- `CatalogQuarantinePromoter` path; no live-table mutation outside WriteGate

**Edge cases:** circular FK; orphan mounts; duplicate loadout keys; full corpus accidentally wired into CI

**Estimated test count:** ~10–14

---

### S32-04 — Facility Aspect Domain Validator (Integration + Logic)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Facility" -v minimal
```

**What to test (GDD `combat-domains-damage.md`):**
- `FacilityAspectDomainValidator` allow/deny with `FACILITY_ASPECT_BLOCK`
- Stable validator registry ordering after Mine
- Flag-off production Baltic — zero abort delta
- Isolated fixture `baltic-patrol-combat-domains-facility` ∉ ReplayGolden 6/6

**GDD edge cases:** multi-domain salvo single abort; friendly mis-ID blocked before validator; deterministic ordering

**Estimated test count:** ~12–16

---

### S32-05 — ECCM Scenario Factor (Integration + Logic)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Eccm|Domain" -v minimal
```

**What to test (GDD `sensor-detection-ew.md` formula):**
```
Pd = clamp01( basePd * envMask * eccmFactor * (1 - jamStrength) )
```
- Optional `eccmFactor` on `ScenarioDetectionTrial` + policy JSON
- `baltic-patrol-jammed` isolated fixture demonstrates ECCM-adjusted detection
- Default path without `eccmFactor` unchanged (`eccmFactor` defaults to `1.0`)

**GDD edge cases:** EMCON mid-tick deferral; jammer destroyed next tick; sorted iteration determinism; same seed → identical contact list

**Estimated test count:** ~10–14

---

### S32-06 — Platform Editor Phase F Damage Unity (Integration) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlatformImport|PlatformCatalogViewer" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform" -v minimal
```

**What to test:**
- `PlatformCatalogViewerHost` shows damage fields (`MaxHp`, resilience, damage-level columns)
- `PlatformImportStagingProjection` surfaces `MaxHp` edit diff
- Propose→approve round-trip via WriteGate; no new SQLite migrations
- `npx gitnexus impact PlatformCatalogViewerHost` + `PlatformWorkbookWriteBridge` before edit

**Edge cases:** missing damage row; zero `MaxHp`; read-only mode; reject clears staging; duplicate propose blocked

**Estimated test count:** ~8–12

---

### S32-07 — Release Diff Report CLI (Integration)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|TlRelease" -v minimal
```

**What to test (DBI-4.5):**
- `catalog_release_diff` verb compares two `ReleaseVersion` values
- Deterministic sorted diff output; empty-diff golden on re-import
- Read-only path — no live-table mutation

**Estimated test count:** ~6–10

---

### S32-08 — Mine Transit Hazard Hot-Tick (Integration + Logic)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Mine" -v minimal
/replay-verify   # on baltic-patrol-mine-transit-hazard
```

**What to test:**
- Scenario `mineHazard` zone + seeded placement
- Deterministic hazard outcomes via existing hot-tick ordering
- Isolated fixture `baltic-patrol-mine-transit-hazard` ∉ ReplayGolden 6/6

**GDD edge cases:** kill + Lost same tick (kill wins); deterministic ordering; same seed → same outcome set

**Estimated test count:** ~10–15

---

### S32-09 — BDA Contact Lifecycle Sim Hook (Integration + Logic)

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Bda|Damage" -v minimal
/replay-verify   # on isolated BDA lifecycle fixture
```

**What to test (GDD `damageLevel` mapping):**
- Contact FSM → `Lost` when `damageLevel ≥ 3` behind `combatDomainsEnabled`
- `OrderLogBdaProjection` and sim-kernel state consistent
- `damageLevel = 2` → degraded, not `Lost`; boundary at 3

**GDD edge cases:** kill + Lost same tick; monotonic rank escalation; miss → unchanged

**Estimated test count:** ~12–18

## Regression Focus

- **S31-03** TL release-train snapshot resolution — must not regress when S32-02 unified manifest lands
- **S31-02/10/11** per-domain `RecordRelease` — S32-02 must preserve pinned hashes, not orphan domain drops
- **S31-04/05/06** mine/facility/BDA Phase 5 — S32-04/08/09 extend, not replace
- **S31-07/08** presentation + C2 PASS WITH NOTES — S32-10/11 upgrade path
- **S28-07** viewer/export hook — S32-06 extends read-only viewer + staging diff only
- **CatalogWriteGate** extend-only on all data/Unity write paths

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test files exist for all Logic and Integration stories (or extended existing test classes)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for Visual/UI stories (or lean PASS WITH NOTES documented)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions on ReplayGolden 6/6 default path
- [ ] Code reviewed; `DelegationBridge.cs` zero touch on Unity merges
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

2. **Sprint gates PASS:** S32-02 unified manifest + S32-06 Phase F damage round-trip
